# Purpose

Architect Supabase usage: schema with Row-Level Security (RLS), auth providers, Realtime subscriptions, Edge Functions, Storage buckets, and migration discipline. Single-responsibility: Supabase platform contract.

# Inputs

- Domain model from `@.cursor/skills/coi-prisma-orm/SKILL.md` or direct Postgres schema drafts.
- API contract from `@.cursor/skills/coi-api-design/SKILL.md`.
- Auth flows from `@.cursor/skills/coi-auth-workflows/SKILL.md`.
- Compliance requirements from `@.cursor/skills/coi-privacy-compliance/SKILL.md`.

# Step-by-Step Workflow

1. Define Postgres schema with explicit roles (`anon`, `authenticated`, `service_role`).
2. Enable RLS on every user-data table; author policies per operation (`select`, `insert`, `update`, `delete`).
3. Configure Auth: providers (email/password, OAuth, magic link, SSO), JWT claims, post-signup hooks.
4. Set up Storage buckets with public/private policies, signed URLs for private assets.
5. Plan Realtime: which tables/columns broadcast, replica identity, subscription filters.
6. Use `supabase` CLI for migrations: `supabase migration new`, `supabase db push`, `supabase gen types typescript`.
7. Edge Functions for server-only logic that needs `service_role`; never expose service key client-side.

# Validation & Metrics

- 100% of user-data tables have RLS enabled and tested with `set role`.
- Auth flows pass round-trip test for each provider.
- Realtime payload size monitored; excluded sensitive columns.
- Migrations idempotent and reversible.
- Generated TypeScript types committed and current with schema.

# Output Format

- `supabase/migrations/<timestamp>_*.sql`.
- `supabase/seed.sql`.
- RLS policy catalogue (markdown).
- `supabase/config.toml`.
- Generated `database.types.ts`.

# Integration Hooks

- `/PLAN db` consumes schema spec.
- `/DEVELOP` runs migrations (without writing app code here).
- `/SCAN security` validates RLS coverage.
- Pairs with `@.cursor/skills/coi-auth-workflows/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/coi-database-optimization/SKILL.md`, `@.cursor/skills/coi-secret-management/SKILL.md`.
- Honors `[.cursor/rules/workspace-orchestration.mdc](.cursor/rules/workspace-orchestration.mdc)`.

# Anti-Patterns

- User-data table without RLS (single biggest Supabase vulnerability).
- `service_role` key shipped to client.
- Realtime broadcasting tables that contain PII.
- Schema changes via dashboard without migration files.
- RLS policies untested with non-owner roles.

# External Reference

- Supabase docs (https://supabase.com/docs) — current.
- PostgreSQL 15+ Row Security (https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/ddl-rowsecurity.html).
- Supabase CLI (https://supabase.com/docs/cli/introduction) — current.
- Closest skills.sh/official analog: supabase / postgres-rls.
